name: Alex T.
text: Delivered our full MVP in 6 weeks — backend API, web dashboard, and mobile app. Clear communication, on-time delivery, no surprises.

name: Maria S.
text: We needed a custom inventory system integrated with our existing tools. The result was exactly what we described, at a very fair price.

name: David K.
text: Hired for REST API development and server setup. Professional work, solid documentation, and always available for follow-up after delivery.
